releases.label: DR19
releases.summary: Second SDSS-V release, first with all three Mappers: MWM optical+IR spectra of >500k stars, BHM spectra/redshifts of ~300k quasars and galaxies, LVM Helix Nebula preview; new Zora/Valis interfaces.

releases.label: DR18
releases.summary: First SDSS-V release: targeting catalogs for BHM/MWM/open-fiber programs and BHM eFEDS spectroscopic follow-up.
